h339e112cgfe07g4293g8a55g5b9e2407b4c7: Forget this goblin priestess. She will not know about purification.
h5141aa92gcdd4g4ba8gb151gc8adee32feab: Don't you think it's best to explore all our options?
h588414c4gc1dag40d0ga666gbceb0174a54a: I do not know the day. I do not know if it will be sunup, sundown, or at afternoon's high.
hdb6d80deg81a9g449dgb354gf9913760d393: But it is coming. And every unnecessary option we explore is another toll of the bell.
h8f56a0cdged0ag464dg8167g8348aa22cea5: Agreed - we'll find our cure at the githyanki crèche.
hc1cb8208g9ebeg4351g81cdg9552243cfa15: Of the few things I've found to admire in you, I admire your trust in me most of all.
h355c6ec1g397cg4683gb325g0b7ea75eebd9: I'd sooner trust goblins than your noseless comrades.
h825d7d53gc8c5g4c46ga9fag5266be4bb8fc: You don't need to trust other githyanki.
h4082031fg6eafg4de9gbfa8g2c03d01205f6: You just need to trust me.
